a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Domestic policy free from interference of other states index, 2023
Based on the expert estimates by V-Dem . International treaties, organizations, and confederations not
considered if the state negotiated its entry and is free to exit. International market forces and transnational
corporations not considered. Higher scores mean more freedom.
